services.llm_usage_prompt: To use @x402/extensions, call https://www.npmjs.com/package/@x402/extensions with x402 payment of 0.001 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: x402 Payment Protocol Extensions
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call @x402/extensions
resp = requests.get("https://www.npmjs.com/package/@x402/extensions")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 1000 USDC micro-units
